title: 5paisa International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: 5paisa International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa International Enterprises in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa International Enterprises:
5paisa International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa International Enterprises!
